 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-bz85l","title":"TEST: fcp-async-core unit test expansion (Deadline, ExecutionContext, channel, sync)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-07T08:57:35.268580Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-07T11:50:59.800299Z","closed_at":"2026-03-07T11:50:59.800286Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fcp2","testing"],"comments":[{"id":961,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-bz85l","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"fcp-async-core: +57 new tests (171→228). Covers Deadline (after/at/clone/eq/run/expired), ExecutionContext (scope/budget/cancel/child/sleep/subscribe), ContextScope (eq/debug/copy), shutdown (wait/sleep_or_shutdown edge cases), sync (mutex lock/try_lock, rwlock concurrent/write, semaphore acquire/owned), Error Display (TryLockError/TryAcquireError), AsyncError variants (Timeout/Cancelled/ChannelFull/ChannelClosed), CancellationToken (new/clone/listener), TaskGroup (spawn+shutdown), time (timeout/interval). All 228 tests pass, clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-03-07T11:50:57Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-bza06","title":"[airtable] Exit protocol loop after shutdown acknowledgment","description":"connectors/airtable/src/main.rs routes the `shutdown` RPC to AirtableConnector::handle_shutdown(), which returns `{"status":"shutdown"}`, but the outer stdin loop keeps reading lines forever. This violates the FCP shutdown contract and can leave the host waiting on a connector that already acknowledged shutdown. Make the protocol handler surface a terminal flag and break the loop after writing the shutdown response, with unit coverage for both response contents and exit behavior.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:46:20.071541Z","created_by":"ChartreuseCardinal","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:58:11.915861Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:58:11.915705Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-bzahl","title":"conformance: gossip summary is_stale freshness window (past-TTL + future-skew)","description":"mesh_gossip_summary_conformance.rs covers MSH-GS-1, MSH-GS-2 (single-byte tamper detection), MSH-GS-4 (cross-peer payload equality), and MSH-GS-5 (differs_from on object addition). It does NOT exercise GossipSummary::is_stale, whose docstring explicitly cites a closed regression: future-dated summaries used to slip past 'age > ttl_secs' because saturating_sub returned 0. Add MSH-GS-6 tests pinning past-TTL stale, within-TTL fresh, future-skew stale, and within-future-skew fresh — plus an MSH-GS-5 addendum that verifies object REMOVAL flips the digest (currently only addition is tested).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T20:11:06.974346Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-04-27T20:18:21.488868Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T20:18:21.488391Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","mesh","tests"],"comments":[{"id":2988,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-bzahl","author":"jemanuel","text":"1d1ec623 adds MSH-GS-5 removal symmetry + 5 MSH-GS-6 is_stale tests (within-TTL, past-TTL, within-future-skew, beyond-future-skew with regression guard for the saturating_sub-zero bypass, and zero-skew far-past). 11/11 pass locally via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test mesh_gossip_summary_conformance. All tests use only public fcp_mesh::gossip + fcp_core API.","created_at":"2026-04-27T20:18:21Z"}]}

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-c0fv","title":"[POL] Diff + risk summary engine","description":"# [POL] Diff + risk summary engine

## Goal
Provide deterministic diffs and risk summaries between policy bundles.

## Deliverables
- Diff engine (stable ordering) for:
  - Zone ceilings, capability grants, roles, and resource bindings.
  - Network constraints expansions (hosts/ports/CIDR changes).
  - Approval/elevation/declassification rules.
- Risk summary with reason codes and severity tiers.

## Design Notes
- Output must be stable and canonical for reproducible reviews.
- Risk summary flags widening egress, new risky caps, and lowered integrity.

## Tests
- Unit tests for diff correctness and ordering stability.
- Golden snapshot tests for representative bundle pairs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Same inputs always yield identical diff output.
- Summary flags risky changes with clear reason codes.","notes":"[AlienArtifactPractical]
- Add evidence ledger fields with per-check log-odds contributions and explicit loss decision.
- Add anytime-valid risk control (e-process) for approvals/denials and record epsilon in receipts.
[ExtremeOptimizationPractical]
- Compile policies to DAG/BDD and cache allow/deny results with LRU.
- Use bitset capability sets for fast subset checks.
